scripts.legacy:count: wrangler d1 execute neurodual-activations --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS issued_codes FROM codes WHERE source = 'legacy_migration';"
scripts.legacy:stats: wrangler d1 execute neurodual-activations --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS issued_codes, MIN(created_at) AS first_issued_at, MAX(created_at) AS last_issued_at FROM codes WHERE source = 'legacy_migration';"
